channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: xAI Introduces Grok Build, a New AI Tool for Software Development
item.description: xAI, the company founded by Elon Musk, has introduced Grok Build, its first AI-powered coding agent. The tool is designed to compete with other AI coding assistants like Anthropic's Claude Code. Musk ...

item.title: Survey Shows Americans Prefer Parents Over Government to Regulate Children's Social Media Use
item.description: A recent survey highlights that most Americans prefer parental oversight rather than government regulation of social media use by children. Despite growing concerns over minors' exposure to online pla...

item.title: Senator Tulfo to Question Senate Shooting Incident and Related Investigation
item.description: Senator Erwin Tulfo announced that the minority bloc will raise critical questions in the Senate session on Monday regarding the alleged shooting incident within the Senate premises last week. Tulfo e...

item.title: North Korean Women's Football Team Visits South Korea for Rare Match
item.description: The North Korean women's football team has arrived in South Korea for a highly anticipated and unusual sporting event. This visit marks one of the rare occasions in recent years where athletes from No...

item.title: Form Three Student Dies After Being Stabbed by Boyfriend During Funeral Vigil in Nyamira
item.description: Nyamira County has been thrown into shock and mourning after a Form Three student, Cherily Portia of Mwongoli High School, was allegedly stabbed to death by her boyfriend during her grandfather’s fune...

item.title: Yari Urges North-West to Support Tinubu’s Re-election in 2027
item.description: Former Zamfara State Governor Abdulaziz Yari don advise Northerners make dem support Bola Tinubu for 2027 elections. Yari yan say make Southern Nigeria complete their eight-year tenure for national un...

item.title: Sybilla Hart’s Guide to Essex Commuter Towns: Areas to Avoid and Hidden Gems
item.description: Sybilla Hart, who has lived in North Essex for 13 years, provides a candid guide to commuter towns in the county, highlighting both pitfalls and appealing spots. She warns against towns like Braintree...

item.title: Supreme Court to Consider Review of Wages and Benefits for Priests and Temple Staff in State-Controlled Temples
item.description: The Supreme Court of India is set to hear on Monday a Public Interest Litigation seeking the formation of a judicial commission or expert committee to review the wages and benefits provided to priests...

item.title: London police make 43 arrests during large-scale operation to manage rival protests
item.description: On Saturday, the Metropolitan Police executed a major operation costing £4.5 million to manage two rival protests in central London, resulting in 43 arrests. More than 4,000 officers, including 660 fr...

item.title: Montreal Family Broadens Search Efforts for Teen Missing in Mont-Tremblant
item.description: A Montreal family is intensifying its search for their teenage son, who went missing in Mont-Tremblant. The young man was last seen in the popular tourist area, prompting immediate concern from local ...

item.title: Dragons suffer tenth straight loss as controversial call costs them against Penrith
item.description: St George Illawarra endured a tough night against Penrith, losing 28-6 to record their tenth consecutive defeat of the NRL season. The match highlighted the Dragons’ ongoing struggles, epitomised by a...

item.title: Why Avoiding Other Drivers’ Blind Spots Is Crucial for Road Safety
item.description: Staying out of other drivers’ blind spots is essential for safe driving. Road safety experts emphasise that even with modern vehicles equipped with blind spot detection systems, drivers cannot rely so...

item.title: US Centcom Appreciates Pakistan's Role in Counterterrorism and Humanitarian Efforts
item.description: The United States Central Command (Centcom) has publicly appreciated Pakistan for its active cooperation in counterterrorism efforts, labelling Islamabad as a 'critical counterterrorism partner' in th...

item.title: Chelsea Confirm Xabi Alonso as New Manager on Four-Year Contract
item.description: Chelsea Football Club has officially announced Xabi Alonso as their new manager, signing him on a four-year deal starting 1st July 2026. Alonso, who previously played for Liverpool and had managerial ...

item.title: Twelve Serving APC House of Reps Lawmakers Fail to Secure Party Tickets in Primaries
item.description: During the recent APC primaries across Nigeria, several sitting members of the House of Representatives were unable to secure tickets to contest for another term ahead of the 2027 general elections. A...

item.title: Shutdown in Manipur over Church Leaders’ Killings Halts Traffic on NH-2
item.description: Over 300 vehicles, mainly goods trucks and passenger buses, were stranded on National Highway 2 in Manipur's Senapati district on Sunday, marking the fifth consecutive day of a shutdown in Kangpokpi d...

item.title: Jonathan Ng of Creamline Wins Executive of the Year for Another Term
item.description: Jonathan Ng, the head of the Creamline Cool Smashers volleyball team, has been recognized once again as Executive of the Year. This award highlights his consistent leadership and exceptional managemen...

item.title: Venezuela's uncertain transition after Trump’s raid on Maduro
item.description: Four months after Donald Trump authorised a rapid operation to capture Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro, the nation faces a bewildering period of political transition. Residents of Catia La Mar exp...

item.title: PPC raises concerns over potential import dumping after AfriSam acquisition by Chinese firm
item.description: South Africa’s cement sector is facing fresh concerns following the Competition Commission’s approval of West China Cement (WCC) acquiring local competitor AfriSam for R2.5 billion. PPC, one of the co...

item.title: House Prosecution Panel Assures Senate Tensions Won’t Delay VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Process
item.description: A member of the House prosecution team handling the impeachment case of Vice President Sara Duterte expressed confidence that recent tensions in the Senate will not impact the impeachment process. Man...
